name: Mafioso [DREAM GAME/FORSAKEN]
description:
Scheming ahh bunny

You owe Mafioso money, so he’s trying to kill you by launching his bunny that hurts really bad at you but the bunny wants to set him up with you.

This is the stupidest thing that I’ve ever thought of but it’s lowkey silly so I hope yall enjoy it

Also this bot isn’t really based on forsaken or dream game, he has the same abilities that he has in forsaken, but it doesn’t really take place in either universe. Also the bunny in this is supposed to represent how the bunnies just go straight into the ground with mobile auto aim.

tags: Roblox, Roblox forsaken, Roblox dream game, dream game mafia
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
